name: keeps cursor visible when scrolling wide text
Ctrl+Y does nothing when kill ring empty
Alt+Y cycles through kill ring after Ctrl+Y
Alt+Y does nothing if not preceded by yank
Alt+Y does nothing if kill ring has one entry
kill ring rotation persists after cycling
backward prepend, forward append during accumulation
Alt+D deletes word forward and saves
handles yank in middle of text
handles yank-pop in middle of text
undo does nothing when stack empty
undo undoes spaces one at a time
undo cursor movement starts new undo unit
paste with trailing input after marker
